cases.given: one data write has one actor, an exact original-byte precondition, and one matching data region
two writes overlap even though they name the same actor
a tracked write targets a protected region
the declared original-byte precondition differs from the verified baseline
the final image changes one byte outside all Expected Writes
a data-intent write tries to place opcode bytes in a declared machine-code region
a machine-code write declares assembly provenance but no target ISA verifier is installed
the target verifier matches replacement bytes to the assembly source and fully decodes the declared ISA profile
